text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Happy New Year!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Let's charge headlong down the Bakushin Road
this year as well!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It's a bit soon, but I've already written my New
Year's resolution!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Being the model student I am, I began writing it
within eight hours of the date changing!
choice_data_list: So, you wrote it after you woke up?
So, you wrote it after you woke up?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Yes!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It might make you so emotional, you'll want to
frame and display it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Please, take a look! Feel free to shed some tears
over my unwavering aspirations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rustle...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I sort of knew what to expect, but...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: That's right!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
The Satsuki Sho, the Japanese Derby, the Kikuka
Sho, the Tenno Sho, as well as the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
This year I'll triumph in all these races. I'm gonna
paint the Classics every shade of Bakushin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I might shed tears at this rate, but for a different
reason.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
The beginning is said to be the most crucial time
of the year! We'll start training at once!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Go on! Exercise that trainer authority and
tell me the first thing on my schedule!
choice_data_list: Let's Bakushin toward a brighter tomorrow!

I'd rather you rest up fully before emerging
from your cocoon.

Why don't you tell me what you want to do
instead?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Bakushin toward a brighter tomorrow! Yeah! By
which you mean to...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: ...Actually, what do you mean by that?
choice_data_list:
Seize the day, or rather tomorrow, with your
speed.

Seize the day, or rather tomorrow, with your
speed.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Ooh! OOH!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I see! Well certainly, it would be possible to
transcend time with my speed!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
In other words, I should start running towards the
Classics already? ...I see!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Understood! I'm going to Bakushin right at what
tomorrow brings!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Bakushin, BAKUSHIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following our discussion, we begin Sakura
Bakushin O's training to increase her speed on the
first day of the new year.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Emerge from my cocoon?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Ah... You couldn't mean to say you—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: But... I'm sorry!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I trust you, Trainer. But...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You're my trainer after all! I'm sorry, I don't see
you as anything more!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Even if I'm destined to become a Bakushin
butterfly, you can't just expect to tame me once
I've emerged!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Above all, as class representative, I could never
engage in such an impure relationship!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It might be a good idea to put some distance
between us for now.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It is difficult to overcome feelings for someone as
outstanding as me, I'm sure. But... I believe in
you, so let's meet again tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, as expected, the class representative must
sometimes deliver bad news.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...Let's get you some rest.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: You want me to tell you?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Just delegating all your decision making is not a
very admirable choice!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
However, it was rather wise to seek the opinion of
an outstanding class representative like me.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Let me answer! What I want to do is...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Why the constraints?!
choice_data_list:
Sometimes it's good to do something out of
your comfort zone.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I see! You want to see the wide variety of ideas I
can come up with, right?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Understood! Allow me to answer you once more.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
What I want to do besides increasing my speed
is...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: NOTHING!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Let me turn this back on you! What else is there
to life besides surpassing your own speed?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Come on, Teach! Tell me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Afterwards, I exchange various thoughts about
training with Sakura Bakushin O. It seems to
contribute to her growth.
